<div align="center">

```
 тЦИтЦИтХЧ   тЦИтЦИтХЧтЦИтЦИтХЧ тЦИтЦИтЦИтЦИтЦИтЦИтХЧтЦИтЦИтЦИтЦИтЦИтЦИтЦИтЦИтХЧ тЦИтЦИтЦИтЦИтЦИтЦИтХЧ тЦИтЦИтЦИтЦИтЦИтЦИтХЧ
 тЦИтЦИтХС   тЦИтЦИтХСтЦИтЦИтХСтЦИтЦИтХФтХРтХРтХРтХРтХЭтХЪтХРтХРтЦИтЦИтХФтХРтХРтХЭтЦИтЦИтХФтХРтХРтХРтЦИтЦИтХЧтЦИтЦИтХФтХРтХРтЦИтЦИтХЧ
 тЦИтЦИтХС   тЦИтЦИтХСтЦИтЦИтХСтЦИтЦИтХС        тЦИтЦИтХС   тЦИтЦИтХС   тЦИтЦИтХСтЦИтЦИтЦИтЦИтЦИтЦИтХФтХЭ
 тХЪтЦИтЦИтХЧ тЦИтЦИтХФтХЭтЦИтЦИтХСтЦИтЦИтХС        тЦИтЦИтХС   тЦИтЦИтХС   тЦИтЦИтХСтЦИтЦИтХФтХРтХРтЦИтЦИтХЧ
  тХЪтЦИтЦИтЦИтЦИтХФтХЭ тЦИтЦИтХСтХЪтЦИтЦИтЦИтЦИтЦИтЦИтХЧ   тЦИтЦИтХС   тХЪтЦИтЦИтЦИтЦИтЦИтЦИтХФтХЭтЦИтЦИтХС  тЦИтЦИтХС
   тХЪтХРтХРтХРтХЭ  тХЪтХРтХЭ тХЪтХРтХРтХРтХРтХРтХЭ   тХЪтХРтХЭ    тХЪтХРтХРтХРтХРтХРтХЭ тХЪтХРтХЭ  тХЪтХРтХЭ
```

[![LinkedIn](https://img.shields.io/badge/LinkedIn-0A66C2?style=flat-square&logo=linkedin&logoColor=white)](https://www.linkedin.com/in/victorcorreagomes)
[![Email](https://img.shields.io/badge/victor@victorcorrea.ai-D97706?style=flat-square&logo=gmail&logoColor=white)](mailto:victor@victorcorrea.ai)

</div>

---

### About

Instructor at [Alura](https://github.com/alura) тАФ taught **Langflow: cria├з├гo e orquestra├з├гo de fluxos e agentes de IA**.

19 PRs merged into [Langflow](https://github.com/langflow-ai/langflow) core. 350+ bugs reported during QA. Recognized by the DataStax team as a Langflow Expert. Built a [g1 component using Groq](https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:activity:7242264525335359488/) that was featured by the Langflow team and recognized by Groq.

Won Brazil's largest AI competition with **[StyleFlow](https://itforum.com.br/inteligencia-artificial/styleflow-looks-ia-vence-langflow/)** тАФ fashion recommendations from a selfie.

---

### Featured Projects

<table>
<tr>
<td width="50%" valign="top">

#### [Arise Agents](https://github.com/Vigtu/arise-agents)

Claude Code plugin for multi-agent orchestration.
Inspired by Solo Leveling.

You say `ARISE`, shadows do the work тАФ
Igris reviews, Beru explores, Tusk refactors.
Each agent has a role, tools, and a model.
XP system tracks progress across commits and PRs.

```
ARISE review my auth code
тЖТ Igris analyzes every line

3 beru to explore auth, cache, and logging
тЖТ three shadows deployed in parallel
```

[![Arise Agents](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/Vigtu/arise-agents?style=for-the-badge&label=arise-agents&labelColor=000&color=D97706&logo=github&logoColor=white)](https://github.com/Vigtu/arise-agents)

</td>
<td width="50%" valign="top">

#### [DocMole](https://github.com/Vigtu/docmole)

MCP server that digs through any documentation site.
Point it at a URL, it indexes everything, you ask questions.

Local RAG with LanceDB + OpenAI embeddings.
Zero-setup mode for Mintlify-powered docs.
Works with Claude, Cursor, any MCP client.

```bash
bunx docmole setup \
  --url https://docs.example.com \
  --id my-docs
bunx docmole serve --project my-docs
# done. ask anything.
```

[![DocMole](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/Vigtu/docmole?style=for-the-badge&label=docmole&labelColor=000&color=D97706&logo=github&logoColor=white)](https://github.com/Vigtu/docmole)
[![npm](https://img.shields.io/npm/v/docmole?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=000&color=D97706)](https://www.npmjs.com/package/docmole)

</td>
</tr>
</table>

---
